improvements: Introduce a 'Mandatory Enrichment' gate requiring API-based IP/ASN reputation and geolocation lookups before finalizing the escalation triage.
Require an 'Investigation Memory' state variable in the triage context to prevent redundant/lost context across iterative investigation steps.
Adjust escalation criteria to require a 'Confidence Evidence Score' (CES) which mandates at least 3 distinct telemetry sources (logs, network, endpoint) before an escalation threshold can be met.
